headline: Business Analyst | Founder & CEO, H Heuristics LLC (market research & advisory)
summary: Results-driven Business Analyst and founder of a market research and advisory firm. Blends financial modeling, market sizing, and regulatory/policy analysis to support institutional investors, enterprise operators, and policymakers. 40+ client engagements ($30K+ earnings, Upwork Top Rated with 100% Job Success), 84+ published institutional market intelligence reports, and an economic advisory readership of ~2,100 subscribers.

experience.title: Founder & CEO
highlights: Published 84+ market intelligence reports on MarketResearch.com spanning software, energy, fintech, and infrastructure
Built an economic advisory Substack readership of ~2,100 subscribers
Executed a 5-state consumer lending regulatory review, federal criminal sentencing analysis, and a Vietnam manufacturing/tariff trade study

experience.title: Business Analyst (Freelance)

Conducted audit-ready IP valuation supporting a ~$100K asset transfer
Performed statewide transportation funding analysis for the New Hampshire DOT
